summary: Frontend UI testing of redesigned NameTagEditor component completed. All 19 features from the test request are working correctly. The editor matches namly.se style with tab-based navigation (Text/Motiv/Bakgrund), live preview with star icon and name text, 12 Google Fonts, font color picker with 24 colors, motif categories with icons, background categories with colors/gradients, quantity controls, add to cart integration, and reset functionality.
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing product ID: 776655c5-bc1a-4f57-93f3-427522f1f622 (Strykmärken med Namn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: NameTagEditor component at /namnskylt/:productId is fully functional. Tab-based UI with Text/Motiv/Bakgrund tabs. Uses data-testid attributes throughout for testing. Add to cart integrates with CartContext and navigates to /varukorg on success.

frontend.live_preview: ✓ Shows default star icon and 'Ditt Namn' text
frontend.text_tab_name_input: ✓ Name input updates preview in real-time
frontend.text_tab_fonts: ✓ 12 fonts available (Moonlight, Minya, Roddy, Pupcat, Octin, Roboto, Josefine, Bubbly, Zigzag, Aktivo, Marker, Striker)
frontend.text_tab_font_colors: ✓ 24 font colors available, selection updates preview
frontend.motiv_tab_switch: ✓ Click Motiv tab switches to motif selection
frontend.motiv_tab_categories: ✓ All 8 categories present (Populära, Alla Motiv, Djur, Natur, Fordon, Sport, Roligt, Mat)
frontend.bakgrund_tab_switch: ✓ Click Bakgrund tab switches to background selection
frontend.bakgrund_tab_categories: ✓ All 5 categories present (Populära, Färger, Alla, Pastell, Gradient)
frontend.price_calculation: ✓ Total price updates with quantity (149 kr x 2 = 298 kr)
frontend.add_to_cart_disabled: ✓ Add to cart button disabled when no name entered
frontend.add_to_cart_enabled: ✓ Add to cart button enabled when name entered
frontend.add_to_cart_action: ✓ Add to cart adds item and navigates to /varukorg with success toast
frontend.reset_design: ✓ Reset button clears name and restores defaults
frontend.mini_preview_grid: ✓ 8 mini labels shown with current design

ui_verification_notes.design_quality: Clean, modern design matching namly.se style with proper spacing and contrast
ui_verification_notes.responsive: Left panel (preview + tabs) and right panel (product info + cart) layout
ui_verification_notes.data_testid_coverage: Comprehensive data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
ui_verification_notes.fonts_loaded: Google Fonts loading correctly for all 12 font options
